MIME-Version: 1.0
From: Start Daily <microsoft.start@email2.microsoft.com>
To: emil.skogsund@gmail.com
Date: Tue, 04 Jun 2024 07:14:12 -0700
Subject: Jury to hear opening statements in Hunter Biden's gun trial
Message-ID: <665f213a.170a0220.319c4e.e74fSMTPIN_ADDED_BROKEN@mx.google.com>
Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8"

<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en-us"><head><meta charset="utf-8"><meta content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" name="viewport"><title>Start Daily</title></head><body bgcolor="#f0f0f0"><table align="center" bgcolor="#f0f0f0" border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" dir="left" style="font-family:Segoe UI,-apple-system,helvetica Neue,Helvetica,Lucida Grande,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif" width="100%">
        <tr><td><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" height="52" style="background-color:#fff;box-shadow:0 3px 0 transparent" width="600"><tr><td align="left" style="padding:0;min-width:150px;min-height:50px;vertical-align:middle"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAACEDVEYU2YJNEF6BFS5MVI4OUU26QIW6DWWGVUDFBRZS5L2FGR7OAKO3SVUWGS4ZSOGF3R6ADH536LGLJUL2AUFA2AZ6H5QYN7M6KARGZGICR6DYUPWSQ77YDFEJ4OXFIEYAHTFNNRDOCDM5URYTTGD5HHXXRNLC2FMZ67JS4DBFR2CDTEMGP&d=AIAADMT4NLE4V45RACQQBTNV7QHUPLJEWOR7G6VUATT7SN7LVYADGELSL2MJI5Z2JYPYQA24EXDJUGWHART337QUFE7TLTADME5G2MODIUZGK7QLDNF7BIM4PE4J2YOUY5LEITDUHII7SG2CH2TBRQORIGLIY7UW3HQCSAHL6ZH7LYW6YGRNYBO6MS4Y2K3OLEQIWAFMNX7DWRF7PQ&" id="NewHeaderMicrosoftStartImg" style="border:none" target="_blank"><img alt="MSN" height="45" src="https://www.bing.com/th?id=OEP.34427CBFF3D4D1C8119FED16222B4DEE&pid=BEmail" style="border:none;text-align:center" width="150"></a></td></tr></table></td></tr>
